ui_planner_output.title: System Health Dashboard
ui_planner_output.subtitle: Operational status and uptime history of market data feeds and exchange connectivity

blocks.title: Data Feed Uptime

dataContract.description: Market data feed uptime dashboard showing 90-day operational history for feeds like NYSE, NASDAQ, FX

blocks.sub_question: What is the 90-day operational history of the primary market data feeds?

blocks.title: Exchange Connectivity

dataContract.description: Exchange connectivity status page where operations teams need to read a quick insight on status

blocks.sub_question: What is the current connectivity status of the major exchange gateways?

blocks.title: Pipeline Health

dataContract.description: Market data pipeline health view listing tagged feeds (equities-feed, fx-rates) with status badges

blocks.sub_question: What is the current health status of the tagged feeds in the market data pipeline?
